verdict: passed_with_issues
headline: The same files were read repeatedly (+1 more).
runs: 1, sessions: 1, events: 26
model/tool: 1 model calls, 1 tool calls
tokens: 120
safety: 1 workspace writes, 1 approvals requested
top tools: read_file:1
top duplicate reads: README.md:10
findings:
- [medium] DUPLICATE_WORKSPACE_READS: The same files were read repeatedly
  evidence: top duplicate reads: README.md:10
  recommendation: Check whether duplicates come from scan tools or explicit file reads before adding read-cache hints; surface prior explicit reads when the same targets repeat.
- [medium] UNTRACKED_WRITE_CAPABLE_BOUNDARY: A process had untracked workspace write capability
  evidence: delegate_external · agent writer · child cmd_writer · access granted
  recommendation: Audit the process output and workspace diff separately; the trace records that write-capable access was granted, not per-file writes.
